user_query: I'm planning a family trip to Asia and I need to calculate the age of my children based on their birth dates. The birth dates are January 5, 2010 and March 20, 2014. Can you provide me with their ages in years, months, and days? Also, I would like to know the available symbols and datasets for the Tardis.dev API.

TaskList.description: Calculate the age of the first child based on the birth date January 5, 2010.
Calculate the age of the second child based on the birth date March 20, 2014.
Retrieve the available symbols and datasets for the Tardis.dev API.
